allow: Bash(python -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Total: {len\(data\)}''\); from collections import Counter; inst=Counter\(r[''institution''] for r in data\); print\(''By institution:''\); [print\(f''  {k}: {v}''\) for k,v in inst.most_common\(\)]")

Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\(''people.json'', encoding=''utf-8''\)\); print\(f''Total: {len\(data\)}''\); print\(''First:'', data[0][''name''], ''@'', data[0][''institutionRaw'']\); print\(''Last:'', data[-1][''name''], ''@'', data[-1][''institutionRaw'']\)")
